draft docs / pre-v0

Product docs for behavior as it becomes real.

These docs are intentionally early. Sections marked pre-v0 describe the intended product surface and will be tightened as implementation lands.

Overview Install pre-v0 Configuration draft Code structure pre-v0 Cost receipts draft Permissions draft Troubleshooting pre-v0
draft overview

Start here

SqueezyAgent is a local terminal coding agent designed to reduce wasteful model context by using static analysis, code-structure lookup, and receipt-backed tool output before asking the model to inspect raw code.

sq SqueezyAgent

A local static engine helps the agent understand code structure before wasting LLM tokens on search.
